title: Subsystem Mission F — Low-Voltage Gateway Interconnect Discovery (EWD Prep)
objective: Map cab-to-frame / cab-to-engine harness families and define exact open questions for the Electrical Wiring Diagram manual — without inventing connector pinouts, CAN resistances, or splice procedures.
success_criteria: Produce an open-question inventory of LV gateway interconnects (connector candidates, network names, APPS/ignition/cluster touchpoints) with SOURCE_DISCOVERED / CANDIDATE status only.
Bind each open question to MEPQ-003 / KG-008 and to SRC-CAND-000006 (EWD) + MISN-000003 commercial handoff.
Do not invent C127 (or any) pin maps, terminal resistances, or VCU splice procedures.
evidence_required: EWD cell index / connector designation confirmation (after commercial acquire)
Harness family list as CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED until EWD bytes
priority_note: Option B selected. Parallel to Mission D — does not replace MISN-000003 commercial EWD acquire. Does not un-defer Mission E.
notes: Discovery mission only until EWD bytes land.
Operator connector ID C127 remains OPERATOR_CANDIDATE.
Coordinates with MISN-000001 (EWD primary) and MISN-000003 (commercial handoff).
